question_text: Let X ∼Bin(3, θ), where θ ∈(0, 1) is an unknown parameter. For testing H0 : 1 4 ≤θ ≤3

options.C: onsider the test ϕ(x) = if x ∈{0, 3}, if x ∈{1, 2}. The size of the test ϕ is (rounded off to two decimal places).

solution:
Step 1: Define the size of the test.
The size of the test is the probability of rejecting H0 when H0 is true. This is the probability
that X ∈{0, 3} when 1
4 ≤θ ≤3
